[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style portrait shows a young man with tousled reddish-brown hair and a white open coat collar, looking off to the side as a small circular yellow smiley face sticker appears near his chest.

The main subject is a person drawn in an anime illustration, shown from the shoulders up. He has pale skin, sharp eyebrows, narrow eyes with an intense gaze, and a slight, serious expression. His hair is reddish-brown with lighter highlights and strands that curve outward, with white bandage-like wraps covering part of his hairline and framing one side of his face; his head tilts slightly to the right.

The setting appears to be a plain, flat background with muted blue-gray tones, suggesting a studio or digital artwork background rather than a real environment. Lighting is evenly distributed in a stylized way, with flat shading and clean outlines.

The image includes a small sticker-like graphic: a circular face with a yellow smiley, a blue outline, and black curved eyes, placed over the lower center area of the image near the chest. No other distinct objects are clearly visible. No important visible text detected.

The image shows a stylized close-up anime character with bandage-like white wraps and reddish hair. A small smiley face sticker overlays part of the character’s chest area.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the provided screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None detected

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be an illustration with no visible UI text, captions, or readable characters.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
